title: 收敛 ledger 路径与兼容迁移（不含 doctor）
description: 统一 ledger 路径常量与解析入口，默认切到 .fabric/.intent-ledger.jsonl，并实现 legacy root 路径只读兼容。同步修正 server/cli/events/pre-commit/tests/docs/i18n 中除 doctor 以外的根路径扩散。
test: 新增或更新测试覆盖：read-ledger 读取新旧路径优先级；ledger-append / pre-commit 使用新路径；events/http 对新路径工作正常；相关 docs/i18n 断言更新。
acceptance_criteria: 全仓仅保留一处真实 ledger path 定义；默认读写 .fabric/.intent-ledger.jsonl；旧根路径只读兼容并有 deprecation 提示；非 doctor 路径相关 docs/tests/i18n 与实现一致。
hints: 先从共享 path resolver 收敛真实路径，再替换分散常量；本任务明确不改 doctor 相关文件 || packages/server/src/services/_shared.ts;packages/server/src/services/read-ledger.ts;packages/server/src/api/events.ts;packages/server/src/http.ts;packages/cli/src/commands/ledger-append.ts;packages/cli/src/commands/pre-commit.ts;README.md;docs/getting-started.md
findings: Converged canonical ledger path handling around `.fabric/.intent-ledger.jsonl`, kept legacy root reads compatible without silent migration, and aligned SSE/event-store, CLI append/pre-commit flow, docs, and targeted tests with the shared resolver. Added dedicated read-ledger coverage for canonical-vs-legacy precedence and migration semantics.
acceptance_met: Met: canonical path is shared via one resolver, all new writes go to `.fabric/.intent-ledger.jsonl`, legacy root ledger remains read-compatible only, non-doctor implementation/tests/docs were updated to match, and targeted Vitest verification passed for read-ledger, ledger-append, pre-commit, and doctor-adjacent ledger consumers.

title: 为 rules meta 增加 stable-id 预编译
description: 为规则文件建立 HTML comment stable-id 预编译链路：扩展 agents meta 类型与 schema，sync-meta 提取 fab:rule-id comment，写入 stable_id 与 identity_source，derived id 仅作迁移辅助。同步扩展 revision 计算，并让 doctor/lint 能识别缺失声明。
test: 新增或更新测试覆盖：sync-meta 提取 declared/derived stable ids；revision 在 stable_id 或 identity_source 变化时更新；schema/类型校验通过；doctor 能识别 derived 节点；lint/模板规则覆盖 comment header 约束。
acceptance_criteria: 规则文件支持固定 comment 语法；sync-meta 预编译 stable_id 与 identity_source；revision 计算纳入身份元数据；doctor 能识别 derived ids 并给出 fix 提示；现有 AGENTS no-frontmatter 约束不被破坏。
hints: 优先使用 identity_source: declared|derived，而非布尔 is_ephemeral；doctor fix 应改规则文件 comment，不直接改 meta || packages/cli/src/commands/sync-meta.ts;packages/shared/src/types/agents.ts;packages/shared/src/schemas/agents-meta.ts;scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts;.workflow/.analysis/ANL-2026-04-23-规则加载中文锚点脚本文档ledger路径/conclusions.json
execution_directives: pnpm build --filter ./packages/shared || pnpm exec vitest run __tests__/sync-meta.test.ts __tests__/sync-meta-shadow-mirroring.test.ts __tests__/lint-protected-tokens.test.ts --config packages/cli/vitest.config.ts || pnpm exec vitest run src/services/doctor.test.ts --config packages/server/vitest.config.ts
findings: Added stable-id precompile chain across shared schema/types and sync-meta using leading `<!-- fab:rule-id ... -->` comments, persisted `stable_id`/`identity_source`, and folded them into revision hashing. Doctor now warns on derived-only rule identities with fix guidance to edit rule comments, and lint/test coverage now validates the header syntax plus declared/derived migration behavior.
acceptance_met: Met: fixed HTML comment syntax is recognized and precompiled by sync-meta; agents meta type/schema now carry stable_id and identity_source; revision changes when identity metadata changes; doctor detects derived ids and points fixes at rule file comments. Verification used build/vitest commands because original --runInBand directive is incompatible with current Vitest.

title: 补齐 doctor --fix 迁移链路
description: 在 ledger 新路径与 stable-id 基线之上，为 doctor 命令补齐显式迁移与修复行为，包括 old ledger deprecation、doctor --fix 迁移入口、以及相关 doctor/CLI 测试与文案。
test: 新增或更新测试覆盖：doctor 检测旧 root ledger；doctor --fix 执行显式迁移；fix 后读写/诊断行为稳定；CLI 文案反映显式迁移而非静默迁移。
acceptance_criteria: doctor 相关实现完整支持显式迁移；fix 改的是源文件/路径状态而非静默副作用；doctor 测试与 CLI 文案一致。
hints: 这个任务单独持有 doctor 相关文件，避免与 path resolver / stable-id 任务冲突；默认建立在 T1a 和 T2 的结果之上 || packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts;packages/server/src/services/doctor.test.ts;packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts;packages/cli/__tests__/doctor.test.ts;.workflow/.analysis/ANL-2026-04-23-规则加载中文锚点脚本文档ledger路径/conclusions.json
findings: Doctor now reports canonical and legacy ledger paths explicitly, warns when only the legacy root ledger exists, and exposes an explicit `doctor --fix` migration path that copies/removes the old file instead of performing silent read-side moves. CLI doctor gained `--fix` wiring and output coverage.
acceptance_met: Met: doctor summary includes ledger path state, legacy-root detection warns instead of mutating on read, `doctor --fix` executes explicit migration semantics, and server/CLI doctor tests passed with the new explicit migration messaging.

title: 扩展 fab_plan_context 为 shared resolved bundle 视图
description: 在保持现有 entries[] 兼容的前提下，为 plan_context 增加 additive shared 视图，输出 resolved_bundle_id、shared_entries、file_map、description_stub_union 与 preflight_diagnostics，并复用预编译 stable ids 与 revision 语义。必要时补 get-rules 内部缓存与 schema parity。
test: 新增或更新测试覆盖：plan-context 新 shared payload；description_stubs parity；resolved_bundle_id 基于 stable ids + revision；旧 client 仍可消费 entries[]；diagnostics 字段在典型场景可用。
acceptance_criteria: plan_context 保持向后兼容；shared 视图结构化输出完整；description_stubs 不再在 batch schema 中丢失；bundle reuse 继续使用 revision_hash/client_hash/stale；单文件 get_rules 仍是最终确认入口。
hints: 先修 schema parity，再加 shared 视图；不要让 batch API 重新读取规则文件提取 stable id，应消费 meta 编译结果 || packages/server/src/services/get-rules.ts;packages/server/src/services/plan-context.ts;packages/server/src/tools/plan-context.ts;packages/server/src/services/plan-context.test.ts;packages/server/src/services/get-rules.test.ts
findings: Extended `fab_plan_context` with an additive `shared` view that exposes `resolved_bundle_id`, shared rule entries, per-path stable-id slices, description-stub union, and preflight diagnostics while keeping legacy `entries[]` intact. The bundle id is derived from sorted precompiled `stable_id`s plus revision, and shared loading reuses matched-node metadata plus content caching instead of reparsing rule files.
acceptance_met: Met: `entries[]` remains backward compatible, plan-context output now carries the additive shared bundle view, per-entry `description_stubs` contract stayed intact, `resolved_bundle_id` is based on revision plus precompiled stable ids, and targeted get-rules/plan-context tests passed.

title: 建立 tooling manifest 与最小文档真源
description: 建立 tooling manifest 作为脚本知识真源，并提供人读说明层。JSDoc 提取仅作为 JS/TS 脚本的可选增强，不进入第一阶段协议真源。确保 rollout 不与前面 hot-path 改动冲突。
test: 新增或更新测试/验证：manifest 结构可读；至少一个现有脚本有 purpose/inputs/outputs/related_rules 描述；若加 extractor，仅在 JS/TS 脚本上工作且不影响无 JSDoc 脚本。
acceptance_criteria: 存在 machine-readable tooling manifest；存在人读说明层；JSDoc 仅作生成/同步增强；脚本与 related rules 可稳定关联；不扩展 agents.meta 为 tools 节点。
hints: 把 tooling 视为独立知识层，不要和第一波 protocol/schema 改动耦合；manifest 为真源，JSDoc 只是 extractor || packages/server/scripts/copy-dashboard.mjs;scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts;docs/initialization.md;.workflow/.analysis/ANL-2026-04-23-规则加载中文锚点脚本文档ledger路径/handoff-spec.json
findings: Added a machine-readable tooling manifest in docs plus a matching human-readable guide, covering representative build and quality-gate scripts with purpose, contract, side effects, and related anchors. The initialization docs now point to this layer and explicitly keep JSDoc extraction as an optional enhancer rather than the source of truth.
acceptance_met: Met: a machine-readable manifest exists, a human-readable companion exists, the manifest ties scripts to stable review anchors, and the docs state that manifest is the source of truth while JSDoc remains optional.
